name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: How much longer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

With $18.4 TRILLION in national debt, how long can members of BOTH parties of Congress keep spending before disaster hits?

Every day the status quo continues in Washington, D.C., _our country inches yet another step toward catastrophe_.

The only way to stop it is to cut up President Obama's credit card, and finally stop the big spenders in BOTH parties of Congress!

That's why, with Congress set to vote on another debt limit increase for our federal government early next month, I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE action.

**[Will you please sign your CUT THEIR CARD petition, and -- if possible -- agree to a generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910466:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)**?

For hardworking men and women around the country, it's common sense. Don't spend more than you take in. Continuing to rack up more and more debt is a path toward ruin.

Yet, in Washington, D.C., we're continually fed Chicken Little stories about what would happen if Congress ever tightened its belt.

Economic Armageddon would supposedly result if spending on ObamaCare, Planned Parenthood, and taxpayer handouts to countries that burn our flag were ever cut.

Yet, infuriating stories of the government wasting our tax dollars never stop, including:

*** $150,000 for free yoga classes for federal employees, and spending over $850,000 onWashington State Community Colleges winemaking classes -- an industry where 94% of workers need no degree;

*** FEMA costing taxpayers $50 million by remediating disaster damage already covered by private insurance;

*** The Los Angeles Unified School District diverting more than $158 million from the National School Lunch Program to pay for lawn sprinklers and salaries at the district's TV station;

*** Handing an Afghan TV station $350,000 to develop a national cricket league.

So today, it's been nearly 15 years since Congress balanced a budget.

And Republicans have controlled one or both houses of Congress for 10 of those.

How many times were you and I told during the 2014 elections that we were electing a bold crop of conservatives who would stand up to President Obama, and say "NO!" to wasteful spending?

But now many members of my own Republican Party want to bust through the sequester's reduction in spending rate increases so they can spend even more!

And now, we're being told we have to raise the debt limit again?

No.

Absolutely not.

As far as I'm concerned, there can be no more kicking the can down the road.

There can be no more saddling our kids and grandkids with debts they can never repay.

Already, each American taxpayer is on the hook for nearly $155,000 on top of their regular tax bills just to pay for past federal spending!

It's time to get serious before it's too late.

It's time to cut up the Washington Machine's credit card and FORCE my colleagues in Congress to live up to their promises to cut spending.

Even if Congress would just cut one penny out of every dollar spent, we'd balance the budget by 2019, and reduce federal spending by $7.5 TRILLION over ten years.

It CAN be done.

But we need more leaders who are serious about cutting spending -- not just talking a good game on the campaign trail.

I've proven I'll act.

Earlier this year, my U.S. Senate office returned nearly half a million dollars to the U.S. Treasury simply by asking my staff to take advantage of new technology to be more efficient.

And I've introduced budget plans that don't just whittle around the edges of Big Government, they eliminate whole federal departments!

My opponents in this presidential race have nothing to offer but talk and hot air.

They'd have you believe our country's fiscal problems will magically disappear as soon as President Obama leaves office.

But the truth is, out-of-control government didn't start with President Obama.

Members of both parties are to blame.

Washington, D.C.'s poisonous culture of cronyism, taxes, spending and debt -- cultivated by those who believe they can run our lives better than we can -- must be destroyed.

That's why, if elected President, I will shake Washington to the core by:

>>> _Imposing term limits on Members of Congress to clean house of ALL career politicians_.

These are the politicians who constantly tell us spending "can't" be cut because they're too wedded to the status quo. It's time to kick them out of office and bring in new blood;

>>> _Force Members of Congress to read the bills they vote on_.

Thousand-page bills rammed through at the last minute are digging our country's grave. They're the way insider lobbyists and corporate cronies sneak through their special deals;

>>> _Ban those receiving taxpayer dollars from lobbying Congress_.

"You fund my project, and I'll bankroll your campaign" political back-scratching has gone on too long. It's time Congress stopped doling out taxpayer dollars to buy votes;

>>> _Return $2 TRILLION in tax dollars to the American people by instituting a 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax_.

This would jumpstart our economy, create 1.4 million new jobs, add 10% in growth to the GDP, blow up the IRS tax code and prove to EVERY American that hardworking citizens can spend their money better than any government politician or bureaucrat.

But first things first.

I campaigned all over the country for Republicans in 2014.

I didn't do so just so my colleagues would turn around and keep the status quo going, and Big Government growing.

Today, Republicans hold the power of the purse. Congress can say "NO!" to more spending and more debt.

But they won't -- not unless they get a loud-and-clear message from patriots like you.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to please sign your CUT THEIR CARD petition immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910466:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)**.

And Fellow Conservative, **[please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910466:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)**.

The more money my campaign can raise, the more it will prove to colleagues in Congress that it's time to get serious about spending - NOW.

The good news is, my campaign has been on an undeniable upward trend in recent weeks.

But I'm counting on you to keep the momentum going.

**[So please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910466:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910467:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910468:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910469:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910470:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910466:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910471:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910472:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30910473:WLmof_mNi:m:1:879035888:DEE9F08B5D42C98CA38E197F65416C81:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWLmof_mNi). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWLmof_mNi)

name: Cody
subject: Fall Fest!
body:
Peter, Did you know school choice can mean a brighter future for kids all over Virginia?
To view this email as a web page, go [ here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=d28022d852ca0af47a6f3667df47c58058d9d87463970a4491dae0c40ed41038591cf3d74d177129)

---
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter, Did you know school choice can mean a brighter future for kids all over Virginia? That's why Americans for Prosperity Virginia is fighting to make sure parents have more choices in their child's education. Join us next Saturday, October 17, for our Fall Festival Phone Bank and School Choice Night! **Fall Festival Phone Bank and School Choice Night
Saturday, October 17th ****5-9pm**
AFP Sterling Office
6 Pidgeon Hill Dr, Ste 130
Sterling, VA 20165We'll be spreading freedom to fellow Virginians, making caramel apples, carving pumpkins, and enjoying the flavors of fall. But that's not all! Get all the facts on why school choice is right for Virginia and hear from Delegate Dave LaRock, who introduced a school choice bill in the state legislature last session. You can RSVP at [afpfallfest.eventbrite.com](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c9a5b33d00f495fd9fbb22a382d90f86f3898fabb557a53125790c11f4bbeab45581030df34ce466 "afpfallfest.eventbrite.com"). Also don't forget Saturday is our National Day of Action, and it's your chance to get involved in the fight for freedom on the ground level! Join us all day for phone banking and door knocking as we spread freedom. To sign up and get all the details, email [cholt@afphq.org](mailto:cholt@afphq.org) or call 571-271-3178. Cody Holt
Northern Virginia Field Director
Americans for Prosperity Foundation - VA
---
| |

\--------------------
Your support will help us continue the fight for economic freedom. [Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c9a5b33d00f495fd10abdf95823e4d1e8f2cb7e9ceff43eb81c94cda7ddc8ba89d9122783cd7d1fa "Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!")
---
| |

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c9a5b33d00f495fd5006991c86235290a214b59f2affd3732371c0a5868901538a501a29ed50d752) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 2111 Wilson Blvd, Ste. 350 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c9a5b33d00f495fdf2b239925bf9062bbac609d63b2ca770ec337857695fdee1d148502f74e335f8) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c9a5b33d00f495fda3c43275043cdcbeee97491f64adce71e6f7e9db4b524d80e8c24172e19ac324)******
---

name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: 31 days of ideas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44352539:6EX3CyLCN:m:1:1349778030:47359DCC4FB2A218181B5632349D9EC5:r)
---
| | | | Peter, There's a lot of reasons why Marco should be President. Just one of them, and an important one: the fact that he's way ahead of other candidates in terms of having a comprehensive policy platform. Taxes, health care, higher education, foreign policy - Marco has laid out 21st Century plans for all of these issues. To make all his ideas easier to access, we're rolling out more explanations of them on MarcoRubio.com throughout the month of October. We're calling it 31 Days of Policy, and it's organized to make it as easy for you to use as possible: by issue area and by what Marco's policies will do for Americans like you. Get caught up on what we've shared already this month:

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: Big news: (on the air)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

This has been a busy week for our campaign. On Wednesday, Chris officially filed his candidacy for US Senate, surrounded by supporters from all over Maryland. On Thursday, we launched our new website, along with a video of local leaders and activists sharing their stories about Chris's deep commitment to our state and the universal respect he enjoys from those who work with him.

Now, we're launching our first TV ad, and we wanted you to be one of the first to see it. This ad speaks to Chris's focus on getting results for the people of Maryland and our country since he first entered public service. Chris is committed to fighting -- and winning -- for Maryland families -- and he has a record to prove that we can count on him to deliver results as our next US Senator. **[Click here to watch the ad:](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fa8/70cdc2ba/47b76c44/3960148/2177639691/VEsH/ "http://www.vanhollen.org?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+watch+the+ad&utm_campaign=em100915&source=em100915")**

[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fa8/70cdc2ba/47b76c44/3960140/2177639691/VEsE/ "http://www.vanhollen.org?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em100915&source=em100915") You've been an integral part of helping our campaign get to this point, and together we're going to help Chris continue to fight for us as Maryland's next Senator.

**[Take a minute to watch the ad, and be sure to share it with your friends and family.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fa8/70cdc2ba/47b76c44/396015d/2177639691/VEsF/ "http://www.vanhollen.org?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Take+a+minute+to+watch+the+ad+and+be+sur&utm_campaign=em100915&source=em100915")**

Thanks,

Sheila O'Connell
Campaign Manager
Van Hollen for Senate
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fa8/70cdc2ba/47b76c44/396015b/2177639691/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em100915&source=em100915") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gail=2C=20BobbyJindal.com?=
subject: Liberals hate the Jindal tax plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
| | | Governor Jindal unveiled his tax reform plan to rave reviews from leading conservatives.
---
| | This week, Governor Jindal unveiled his tax reform plan to rave reviews from leading conservatives.

As is usually the case with sound conservative policy, liberal bloggers you’ve never heard of absolutely hated the Governor’s plan.

Governor Jindal’s plan is based on core conservative principles:
1. Cutting the tax code down to just three simple brackets;

2. Leveling the playing field so big corporations with lobbyists and lawyers can no longer get special deals that the rest of us can’t;

3. And making sure that every American pays something into our system, so every American is invested in the government spending our tax dollars wisely.

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=b3406787ba&e=724c64cfa7)

The genius of America is that hard work and ingenuity are rewarded and enable people to succeed and make their own way in life. Independence, not dependence, is the root of the American Dream. It’s time we had the guts to say so in public.

Read the full Jindal tax plan here and tell us what you think: [https://www.bobbyjindal.com/tax/](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=6b9770c4f6&e=724c64cfa7)

Have a great weekend,

Gail Gitcho
Senior Advisor, Jindal for President

---
| | | Paid for by Jindal For President
---
|

clean_body: | | | Governor Jindal unveiled his tax reform plan to rave reviews from leading conservatives. | | This week, Governor Jindal unveiled his tax reform plan to rave reviews from leading conservatives. As is usually the case with sound conservative policy, liberal bloggers you’ve never heard of absolutely hated the Governor’s plan. Governor Jindal’s plan is based on core conservative principles: 1. Cutting the tax code down to just three simple brackets; 2. Leveling the playing field so big corporations with lobbyists and lawyers can no longer get special deals that the rest of us can’t; 3. And making sure that every American pays something into our system, so every American is invested in the government spending our tax dollars wisely. The genius of America is that hard work and ingenuity are rewarded and enable people to succeed and make their own way in life. Independence, not dependence, is the root of the American Dream. It’s time we had the guts to say so in public. Read the full Jindal tax plan here and tell us what you think: Have a great weekend, Gail Gitcho Senior Advisor, Jindal for President | | | Paid for by Jindal For President | | Copyright © 2015 JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT, All rights reserved.

name: Chelsea Clinton
subject: hi there
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Can you help my mom? | Friend --

My mom is my hero. From helping cut the uninsured rate for children in half as First Lady to later becoming the first female senator from New York and then running for president, she's kept fighting for families -- while also being a great mom.

I hope my daughter grows up to be as proud of me as I am of my mom.

That she's remained committed to making life better for women and children while being attacked by the other side for more than two decades is incredible and inspiring. I'm proud to stand with her in everything she does.

Tuesday is the first debate of the Democratic primary, where my mom will continue talking about her plans and ideas to make life better for American families. Here's one way to let her know you have her back before the big day: **[Chip in $1 to stand with her and become a Debate Donor.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It's going to take a campaign as strong as my mom is to fight back against everything the other side is throwing at her, and to help us become the country we want to be. I can't tell you how much she'll appreciate your support at this critical moment.

**Donate $1 to become a Debate Donor before Tuesday:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Chelsea

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM3MTc2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDExOTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
